name: Olive Garden Heart Healthy Chicken/Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spinach in the chicken broth until tender.
2. Drain and reserve the broth.
3. Mash out excess liquid from the cooked spinach.
4. Cook the pasta according to package instructions.
5. Preheat a saute pan or heavy skillet over medium heat.
6. Add the olive oil or vegetable spray to the pan.
7. Saute the garlic, stirring constantly, until it is white but not browned.
8. Add the spinach and nutmeg or mace, salt, and pepper.
9. Add the chicken pieces to the spinach mixture and stir gently.
10. If needed, add a small amount of the reserved cooking broth to the spinach mixture.
11. Stir the spinach until hot and coated with broth as necessary.
12. Remove the pasta from heat and immediately drain it.
13. Add the shells into the spinach mixture and blend well.
14. Serve immediately with grated Parmesan.
